title: BEM-738 Claude bridge
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tmp']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 15:21 (UTC+3)'
preflight=Path('scripts/prepare_claude_inbound_context.py')
preflight.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport json\nfrom pathlib import Path\nINBOX=Path("governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude")\nSTATE=Path("governance/state/claude_inbound_processed_requests.json")\ntry:\n    data=json.loads(STATE.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")) if STATE.exists() else {}\nexcept:\n    data={}\nprocessed=set(data.get("processed",[]))\nfiles=sorted([p for p in INBOX.glob("*") if p.is_file()], key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime) if INBOX.exists() else []\nlatest=str(files[-1]) if files else ""\nshould="true" if latest and latest not in processed else "false"\nprint("should_run="+should)\nprint("latest_file="+latest)\n''')
mark=Path('scripts/mark_claude_inbound_processed.py')
mark.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport json\nimport sys\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\nfrom pathlib import Path\nSEP="\\n"\nKYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))\nSTATE=Path("governance/state/claude_inbound_processed_requests.json")\nlatest=sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else ""\noutcome=sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv)>2 else "unknown"\ntry:\n    data=json.loads(STATE.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")) if STATE.exists() else {}\nexcept:\n    data={}\nprocessed=data.get("processed",[]) if isinstance(data.get("processed",[]),list) else []\nif latest and outcome=="success" and latest not in processed:\n    processed.append(latest)\nnow=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)")\ndata.update({"schema_version":"claude_inbound_processed_requests.v1","processed":processed,"last_file":latest,"last_outcome":outcome,"updated_at":now})\nSTATE.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)\nSTATE.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding="utf-8")\nprint(json.dumps({"latest":latest,"outcome":outcome,"processed_count":len(processed)},ensure_ascii=False))\n''')
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-mailbox.yml')
wf.write_text('''name: Claude Internal Auditor Mailbox

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  workflow_run:
    workflows: ["Codex Runner"]
    types:
      - completed
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/**'
      - '.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-mailbox.yml'
      - 'scripts/record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py'
      - 'scripts/prepare_claude_inbound_context.py'
      - 'scripts/mark_claude_inbound_processed.py'

permissions:
  contents: write
  issues: write

concurrency:
  group: claude-internal-auditor-mailbox
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  claude-internal-auditor:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Syntax check helper scripts
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py scripts/prepare_claude_inbound_context.py scripts/mark_claude_inbound_processed.py
      - name: Preflight latest request
        id: preflight
        run: |
          python3 scripts/prepare_claude_inbound_context.py > governance/tmp/claude_inbound_preflight.env
          cat governance/tmp/claude_inbound_preflight.env >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
      - name: Record workflow start
        if: steps.preflight.outputs.should_run == 'true'
        run: python3 scripts/record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py start started
      - name: Claude internal auditor responds to mailbox
        if: steps.preflight.outputs.should_run == 'true'
        id: claude_response
        continue-on-error: true
        uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
        with:
          anthropic_api_key: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          prompt: |
            You are Claude Internal Auditor for repository bereznyi-aleksandr/ai-devops-system.
            Read the newest file in governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/.
            Write a concise response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/ with a filename containing the BEM id.
            Include explicit Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED when asked.
            If asked why no prior response existed, explain the runtime or trigger reason based on repository evidence.
            Do not write issue comments. Do not expose secrets.
          claude_args: |
            --max-turns 8
      - name: Record workflow completion
        if: steps.preflight.outputs.should_run == 'true' && always()
        env:
          CLAUDE_OUTCOME: ${{ steps.claude_response.outcome }}
        run: python3 scripts/record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py complete "$CLAUDE_OUTCOME"
      - name: Mark processed on success
        if: steps.preflight.outputs.should_run == 'true' && steps.claude_response.outcome == 'success'
        run: python3 scripts/mark_claude_inbound_processed.py "${{ steps.preflight.outputs.latest_file }}" success
      - name: Commit Claude runtime state
        if: always()
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add -A governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json governance/state/claude_inbound_processed_requests.json governance/reports/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.md governance/state governance/reports governance/transport governance/tmp/claude_inbound_preflight.env || true
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-738 Claude inbound workflow-run bridge state"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')
text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
checks=[
 {'name':'workflow_run_bridge','pass':'workflow_run:' in text and 'Codex Runner' in text,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'preflight_exists','pass':preflight.exists(),'evidence':str(preflight)},
 {'name':'mark_exists','pass':mark.exists(),'evidence':str(mark)},
 {'name':'preflight_guard','pass':'should_run' in text,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'no_schedule_trigger','pass':'schedule:' not in text,'evidence':str(wf)}]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='workflow_run_bridge_installed' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'CLAUDE_WORKFLOW_RUN_BRIDGE_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'claude_inbound_workflow_run_bridge.v1','bem':'BEM-738','status':status,'checks':checks,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem738_claude_inbound_workflow_run_bridge.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem738_claude_inbound_workflow_run_bridge.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-738 | Claude Inbound Workflow-Run Bridge | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Added workflow_run bridge from Codex Runner completion plus preflight guard for unprocessed GPT-to-Claude mailbox files.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem738_claude_inbound_workflow_run_bridge','status':status,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem738_claude_inbound_workflow_run_bridge.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-738 '+status+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(preflight),str(mark),str(wf),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Installed workflow_run bridge from Codex Runner to Claude inbound workflow so GitHub Actions pushes are not the only wake mechanism')
"""
No issue comments.
